findings.description: ApplicationSettingLogFormatter および LauncherLogFormatter（差し替え元のクラス）がhints未記載。また、ApplicationSettingJsonLogFormatterおよびLauncherJsonLogFormatterの設定テーブルに含まれる以下のプロパティ名がhints未記載: appSettingTargets, appSettingWithDateTargets, systemSettingItems, startTargets, endTargets, startLogMsgLabel, endLogMsgLabel
findings.source_evidence: ソースの各設定テーブル第1列: applicationSettingLogFormatter.appSettingTargets, .appSettingWithDateTargets, .systemSettingItems, launcherLogFormatter.startTargets, .endTargets, .startLogMsgLabel, .endLogMsgLabel。クラス名: ApplicationSettingLogFormatter, LauncherLogFormatter
